dialogue.npc: "...Your notes fell. (Pause) Your handwriting is... decent. Neater than mine."
dialogue.player: "Was that a compliment? I'll take it~"

dialogue.npc: "Your lips... different color. (Looks away) And that dessert — I don't like sweets. But... if you made it, I wouldn't mind next time."
dialogue.player: "Hehe, caught you looking~ Next time I'll make something even better!"

dialogue.npc: "Another perfect score? ... (Silent pause) Let's walk home together. Don't get the wrong idea — it's just on my way. ...It's on my way every day."
dialogue.player: "Every day, huh? What a convenient route, senior~"

dialogue.npc: "Phew —! I'm dying of thirst! This water is a lifesaver! ...Hey, why are your hands so cold? Here, let me warm them up!"
dialogue.player: "Coach, your hands are so hot! Just finished a game, right?~"

orders.name: ⚡ First Aid

dialogue.npc: "I bumped my lip during the game... What are you putting on it? Smells nice... (Ears suddenly red) You're too close! No wait — I didn't say I hated it —"
dialogue.player: "Hold still! Let me put this on, or it won't heal properly~"

orders.failText: The coach got pulled away to deal with other injuries... Your feelings didn't reach him.

dialogue.npc: "Your bento is so good! I want to make it for you every day! Wait no — I mean, I want to eat your — NO! Um... are you free this weekend? Let's watch a game! Just the two of us!"
dialogue.player: "Haha, Coach, your face is so red! Sure, just the two of us~"

dialogue.npc: "What a wonderful scent... You look like you stepped out of a Monet painting today. (Leans in slightly) Do you know the language of roses? It means 'heartbeat.' Just like how I feel right now."
dialogue.player: "Thank you~ Daniel always knows how to make a girl blush..."

orders.name: ⚡ Romantic Invitation

dialogue.npc: "Beautiful, and so brilliant too. (Fingers lightly touch) Could I buy you a coffee tonight? No shop talk — just... you."
dialogue.player: "I'd love to! But I don't drink coffee at night~ How about hot cocoa instead?"

orders.failText: The romantic atmosphere slowly faded... Daniel smiled with regret: 'Maybe next time.'

dialogue.npc: "Chérie... Your eyes hold an entire galaxy, and I have completely fallen into them. From now on, every poem I write will be for you alone."
dialogue.player: "Me too... My heart beats only for you."

dialogue.npc: "Young lady, your performance is indeed impressive. (Adjusts glasses) But if you want to catch my attention, this is far from enough. ...Keep trying. I'm watching you."
dialogue.player: "(Smiles) Principal, please keep watching. I won't disappoint you."

orders.name: ⚡ Break the Defense

dialogue.npc: "You always seem so proper... I never expected you to barge into my office. (Swallows hard) ...Do you know what this means?"
dialogue.player: "(Smiles) It means... the Principal will make an exception for me?"

orders.failText: The Principal's defenses remain impenetrable... Your feelings couldn't pierce that calm facade.

dialogue.npc: "I make the rules, but you... are my only exception. (Loosens tie) No classes today. Stay here — with me. That's not an order. It's a request."
dialogue.player: "As you wish, Principal~ ❤️ This time, it's entirely voluntary."
